title: How do you debug your algo trading bot when it underperforms ?
author: GaryCLT
selftext:
MT5, MT4, cTrader, NinjaTrader...

When your bot misses entries, gets rejected by the broker, 

or just underperforms — how do you figure out why?

Manual log reading? Custom scripts? Spreadsheets? 

Something else?

I'm building a tool to automate this diagnostic process 

and want to understand how people actually handle it 

before I ship anything.

Any fedback appreciated.
